description:
Music Player Daemon (MPD) is a flexible, powerful, server-side application for playing music. Through plugins and libraries it can play a variety of sound file while being controlled by its network protocol.

## Notes

* Read [the user manual](http://www.musicpd.org/doc/user/) for documentation.
summary: Music Player Daemon is a flexible, powerful, server-side application for playing music.
author: Max Kellermann
